title: ManifestUnit
description: A single file unit in the review manifest, representing one changed file with its metadata.

unit_id.description: Unique identifier for this manifest unit

path.description: File path (display-quoted if special characters present)

status.description: Git status code (M, A, D, R, C, etc.)

diff_bytes.description: Size of the diff in bytes

content_fingerprint.description: Repository-native Git object hash of this unit's source-pinned diff

group_id.description: ID of the review group this unit belongs to

review_command.description: Shell command to review this specific file

context_command.description: Shell command to get context for this file
